courseRules.name: Limited palette
courseRules.detail: Start with a small ramp before adding extra colors.

courseRules.name: Value first
courseRules.detail: Readable silhouettes come from luminance separation, not hue novelty.

courseRules.name: Hue-shift ramps
courseRules.detail: Let shadows cool and highlights warm instead of only changing lightness.

courseRules.name: Controlled saturation
courseRules.detail: Push saturation where the player should look first.

courseRules.name: Dither sparingly
courseRules.detail: Use patterns to imply texture, not to hide an unclear palette.

presets.name: Sunlit brass
presets.note: Warm highlights and olive shadows for readable treasure sprites.

presets.name: Moonlit ivy
presets.note: Cool blue-green values for foliage, slime, and quiet night tiles.

presets.name: Cave ruby
presets.note: Deep red ramp with muted shadow mass and sharp highlight accents.

presets.name: Harbor steel
presets.note: Low-saturation blue ramp for metal, wet stone, and cloudy UI frames.

presets.name: Neon plum
presets.note: High-chroma accent ramp for magical effects and readable pickups.

presets.name: Ember clay
presets.note: Earthy orange ramp for pottery, brick, and warm terrain.
